_source: Old Babylonian teratomancy: anomalous (miscarried-foetus) omens. Ed. A. R. George, Babylonian Divinatory Texts Chiefly in the Schoyen Collection (CUSAS 18), 2013, no. 12. English translation: George 2013.
_note: Organized by body feature of the malformed foetus. The DIRECT genre parallel to the Ugaritic sheep-birth omens (KTU 1.103): both read an anomalous newborn body and predict the fate of king and land.

horns.two on right, one on left: symbol of Sargon, who had no equal
horns.two on left, one on right: enemy will hem you in and take away your territory
horns.protruding: there will be an all-powerful king in the land; alternative: the dynasty of the king and his sons is at an end

eyes.on forehead: there will be an all-powerful king in the land
eyes.single large eye on forehead: there will be an all-powerful king in the land
eyes.eye down level with jaw: there will be an all-powerful king
eyes.one eye: a populous land will gather in strongholds

mouth.second mouth on right jaw: the king’s word will carry more weight than his enemy’s
mouth.second mouth on left jaw: you will behave as your enemy’s subordinate

hair.long like lion’s mane on right jaw: the king will have no equal
hair.coat of wool: end of dynasty, king’s rule ends; in war, enemy will defeat army, people will mourn

body.two bodies, one head: there will be an all-powerful king in the land
body.two heads, two mouths, two shoulder-blad: the town where it was born will be defiled, the land will be devoured
body.two heads, two spines, two tails, eight: king’s son will occupy the throne

limbs.missing pair of feet, regular mouth and: town will experience famine and be in dire straits
limbs.bowels on head, open wound on right side: town will be captured, razed, and people scattered
limbs.left front hoof like donkey’s hoof: famine will grip the enemy’s land

bowels.spilling out in a pile: people will experience famine, will send their possessions to market
bowels.on top of head: another people will carry off that people’s possessions

appearance.like an ibex: there will be a strong king in the land
appearance.like a brick: hardship will grip the land, barley-ration will diminish
appearance.full of air like a bladder: palace will become empty, Adad will devastate the irrigated land
appearance.like a cheetah: there will be an all-powerful king in the land
appearance.like a turtle: dynasty of Enlil; land will prosper, king of Sumer will rule
appearance.like a lion’s face: strong king will mobilize the land; alternative: fatal epidemic

teeth and tongue.teeth already erupted: king’s days are over, another will sit on throne
teeth and tongue.no tongue: rule will be reign of wicked man, criminals will destroy the land

spine and ribs.four ribs, four haunches, four shoulders: there will be an all-powerful king in the land
